series_metadata.series_description: All information gathered during the course of an Enforcement investigation, administrative actions, including consent order, "default" orders, "voluntary surrender" forms and orders issued after an administrative hearing. Excludes database field information*

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 10 years, then shred/erase. ; Electronic: Retain 10 years, then shred/erase., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
